# r2slides

[![Codecov test
coverage](https://codecov.io/gh/Adam-Hubbs/r2slides/graph/badge.svg)](https://app.codecov.io/gh/Adam-Hubbs/r2slides)
[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/Adam-Hubbs/r2slides/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/Adam-Hubbs/r2slides/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)

r2slides is a package designed to create and modify Google Slides
presentations in R. It can be used to push tables, charts, and images to
Google Slides.

To install r2slides, run

``` r

pak::pkg_install("Adam-Hubbs/r2slides")
```

For a more in-depth overview of the main systems, look at the [articles
on the package website](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/).

## Example Workflow

``` r

chart_data |>
  write_gs("Seahawks vs Dolphins Points Per Game") |>
  get_chart_id() |>
  add_linked_chart(
    on_slide_number(
      4
    ),
    in_top_left()
  ) |>
  add_text_multi(
    month_change,
    position_base = in_top_left(),
    position = c(
      seahawks_change_mm,
      dolphins_change_mm
    ),
    text_style = change_style,
    stat_sig = attr(month_change, 'stat_sig')
  ) |>
  add_text_multi(
    moe_text,
    position_base = in_top_left(),
    position = c(
      seahawks_point_estimate,
      dolphins_point_estimate
    ),
    text_style = point_estimate_style
  ) |>
  add_text_multi(
    year_change,
    position_base = in_top_left(),
    position = c(
      seahawks_change_yy,
      dolphins_change_yy
    ),
    text_style = change_style,
    stat_sig = attr(year_change, 'stat_sig')
  )
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`add_image()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/add_image.md)
  : Add image to a Google Slides presentation
- [`add_linked_chart()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/add_linked_chart.md)
  : Add a linked chart form Google Sheets
- [`add_table()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/add_table.md)
  : Add a table to a Google Slides slide
- [`add_text()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/add_text.md)
  : Add text in a Google Slides presentation
- [`add_text_multi()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/add_text_multi.md)
  : Add or update text in a Google Slides presentation
- [`as_r2slides_table()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/as_r2slides_table.md)
  : Convert a table object to an r2slides_table
- [`bounding_box()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/bounding_box.md)
  : Calculate Bounding Box for Slide Position Objects
- [`chart_id()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/chart_id.md)
  : Chart ID class
- [`combine_style()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/combine_style.md)
  : Combine Text Styles
- [`correct_slide_size()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/correct_slide_size.md)
  : Correct slide sizes
- [`create_styling_request()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/create_styling_request.md)
  : Create a styling request
- [`define_relative_transformation_function()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/define_relative_transformation_function.md)
  : This function takes transformations for top, left, width, and
  height, and returns a function that applies those transformations to a
  slide_position object.
- [`element()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/element.md)
  [`text_element()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/element.md)
  [`image_element()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/element.md)
  [`chart_element()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/element.md)
  [`table_element()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/element.md)
  [`shape_element()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/element.md)
  : Element objects
- [`element_type()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/element_type.md)
  : Get the type of an element
- [`get_active_presentation()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_active_presentation.md)
  : Get the currently active presentation
- [`get_active_spreadsheet()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_active_spreadsheet.md)
  : Get the currently active spreadsheet
- [`get_all_elements()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_all_elements.md)
  : Get all elements in a slide
- [`get_chart_id()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_chart_id.md)
  : Get chart_id from a Google Sheet
- [`get_elements()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_elements.md)
  : Get elements from a slide
- [`get_image()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_image.md)
  : Get image URL or file path from an image element
- [`get_linked_sheet()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_linked_sheet.md)
  : Get the linked Google Sheet chart reference from a chart element
- [`get_match_fn()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_match_fn.md)
  : Get the current match function
- [`get_page_elements()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_page_elements.md)
  : Get page elements for a slide
- [`get_position()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_position.md)
  : Get the position of an element
- [`get_raw()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_raw.md)
  : Get the raw API node for an element
- [`get_replacement_strategy()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_replacement_strategy.md)
  : Get the current replacement strategy
- [`get_safe_length()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_safe_length.md)
  : Get the length of an argument
- [`get_table()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_table.md)
  : Get table cell text from a table element
- [`get_text()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_text.md)
  : Get the text content of an element
- [`get_text_style()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/get_text_style.md)
  : Get the text style of an element
- [`in_qualtrics_title()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/in_qualtrics_title.md)
  : Creates a slide_position object with defaults in the title of the
  slide
- [`is.presentation()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/is.presentation.md)
  : is.presentation
- [`is.slide()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/is.slide.md)
  : Check if an object is a slide
- [`is.slide_position()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/is.slide_position.md)
  : Is slide_position
- [`is.spreadsheet()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/is.spreadsheet.md)
  : Check if an object is a spreadsheet
- [`is_element()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/is_element.md)
  : Test whether an object is an element
- [`match_by_type_and_position()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/match_by_type_and_position.md)
  : Match elements by type and position
- [`new_presentation()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/new_presentation.md)
  : Create a new Google Slides presentation
- [`new_slide()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/new_slide.md)
  : Create a new slide in a Google Slides presentation
- [`new_spreadsheet()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/new_spreadsheet.md)
  : Create a new Google Sheets spreadsheet
- [`on_slide_id()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/on_slide_id.md)
  [`on_slide_url()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/on_slide_id.md)
  [`on_slide_number()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/on_slide_id.md)
  [`on_slide_after()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/on_slide_id.md)
  [`on_slide_with_notes()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/on_slide_id.md)
  : Create a slide object
- [`peek()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/peek.md) :
  Peek at a slide
- [`presentation`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/presentation.md)
  : R6 Class for Google Slides Presentations
- [`query()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/query.md)
  : Query Google API's
- [`solid_color()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/r2s_color.md)
  [`theme_color()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/r2s_color.md)
  : Color classes
- [`r2slides_auth()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/r2slides_auth.md)
  : Create OAuth authentication token
- [`r2slides_deauth()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/r2slides_deauth.md)
  : Clear current token
- [`r2slides_table`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/r2slides_table.md)
  : Table Objects
- [`r2slides_token()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/r2slides_token.md)
  : Get authentication token
- [`register_presentation()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/register_presentation.md)
  : Register a Google Slides presentation
- [`register_spreadsheet()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/register_spreadsheet.md)
  : Register an existing Google Sheets spreadsheet
- [`relative_position()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/relative_position.md)
  : Relative Position
- [`send_to_front()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/send_to_front.md)
  [`send_to_back()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/send_to_front.md)
  [`send_forward()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/send_to_front.md)
  [`send_backward()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/send_to_front.md)
  : Change the Z-order of a page element
- [`set_match_fn()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/set_match_fn.md)
  : Set the match function
- [`set_replacement_strategy()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/set_replacement_strategy.md)
  : Set the replacement strategy
- [`sht_id()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/sht_id.md)
  [`is_sht_id()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/sht_id.md)
  : Sheet ID class
- [`in_top_left()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/slide-position-helpers.md)
  [`in_top_middle()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/slide-position-helpers.md)
  [`in_top_right()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/slide-position-helpers.md)
  [`in_bottom_left()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/slide-position-helpers.md)
  [`in_bottom_middle()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/slide-position-helpers.md)
  [`in_bottom_right()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/slide-position-helpers.md)
  : Creates a slide_position object with defaults in the top left of the
  slide
- [`slide()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/slide.md)
  : Slide Object
- [`slide_position()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/slide_position.md)
  : Slide Position Object
- [`spreadsheet`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/spreadsheet.md)
  : R6 Class for Google Sheets Spreadsheets
- [`str_before()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/string-helpers.md)
  [`str_after()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/string-helpers.md)
  [`str_matches()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/string-helpers.md)
  : String helper functions for text positioning
- [`style_rule()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/style_rule.md)
  : Style Rule Object
- [`text_style()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/text_style.md)
  : Text styling properties
- [`visualize_color()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/visualize_color.md)
  : Visualize a color
- [`write_gs()`](https://adam-hubbs.github.io/r2slides/reference/write_gs.md)
  : Write data to a Google Sheet
